LanguageData.TranscendentDropPods.label: overmind drops
LanguageData.TranscendentDropPods.description: Simulates a mechanoid overmind control signal, ordering nearby logistics satellites to dispatch several single-use drop pods to the target area.
LanguageData.TranscendentSelfTeleport.label: serialized transit
LanguageData.TranscendentSelfTeleport.description: Serializes the user into a higher-dimensional transit tunnel, then deserializes at the target spacetime coordinates.
